font : poppins   
orange color code: FF9300 (highlight ba onno kichu baray komanor ultimate output change asle somossa nai)  
Page Names: Homepage, Services, About Us, Career   


Things to Improve in the :

Two separate gradients were used which is perfect but make it lighter. Put the title text on the top right and also keep the body copy aligned and put a minimal button like this. Added ss of the proper placement (ignore the brown mafia and orangish strip (we will fix it later))

Title Copy  
Font Name: poppins \-\> medium  
size: 110  
Body Copy  
Font Name: poppins \-\> Extra Light  
size: 24    

(Optimise text size if necessary, giving you just for context)

![][image1]

Extend the gradient and put the copy in the suggested place, ss contains the marking where the gradient should go, kind of fill the 100% of the section if possible   
Btw No need to show the regular menu (About us, service, testimonials and faq contact) in the menu bar  
It will open only in hamburger menu, bellow  marked it with purple color   
![][image2]

In testimonial section  
Both the testimonial and Names and designation is given with Poppins extra light font  
For the testimonial font size is given 35 and name designation it is 18\. Everything else in this section seems very good .
